creator: weberbug@gmx.de
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #1)

Problem still there with 


https://download.freebsd.org/releases/arm64/aarch64/ISO-IMAGES/14.2/FreeBSD-14.2-RELEASE-arm64-aarch64-RPI.img.xz

and

https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/snapshots/arm64/aarch64/ISO-IMAGES/14.3/FreeBSD-14.3-STABLE-arm64-aarch64-RPI-20250508-5cf27a49a2de-271423.img.xz

Workaround still works. Both work with an RealTek RTL8201E USB network adapter.
